leaf.title: Reconcile temperature domain registry key between module and router
leaf.content:
The temperature module registers under 'temp' while the CLI router resolves 'temperature'. Decide the canonical key, align both sides, and add a contract test so the registry key can never silently fork again.

Files: unitconv/temperature.py, unitconv/cli/router.py, tests/test_cli.py

Acceptance criteria:
- tests/test_cli.py::test_convert_temperature passes
- one canonical domain key asserted by a registry contract test

Test expectations: add a registry contract test alongside the fixed integration test

actions.rationale: Suite red though both leaves individually passed — the interaction (registry key mismatch) is the defect.
